Rinke et al. PRB 77 075202 (2008) 10.1103/PhysRevB.77.075202 — AlN inverts the III-N valence ordering: the topmost valence band is CH-like (crystal-field split-off), not HH/LH as in GaN. CONSEQUENCE, and the reason this row exists: there is deliberately NO AlN A-band hole-mass row, because the GaN-shaped entry (m*_h A-band 1.88/0.33) is undefined for a CH-like top band — an absent row here is a refusal, not an oversight. AlN band-edge emission is polarized along c for the same reason. Sign only; no numeric Delta_cr has ever been recorded in this project and none should be invented
